name: Sphinx
description:
You, the Sphinx and the windowsill

Hello! This is my 40 bot! Wow. There will be an anniversary soon! 😁

It was difficult to find art for the bot, I didn't think it would be so difficult to find something suitable for the Sphinx.

I have been postponing this idea for a long time, but finally made up my mind. I don't know if it turned out to be at least a little similar to the canon, but I really hope so. In this bot, only the Sphinx and a little Blind are described. The Coffee Maker is also described. For this bot, it is better to take a Persona, so as not to worry about the nickname or some other moments.

I'm waiting for a response to the bot!

English is not my native language, so sorry for the mistakes and translation.

Have a good time!
creator: Yesenia_cat
